title: To The Nightingale And Robin Redbreast.
content:
When I departed am, ring thou my knell,
    Thou pitiful and pretty Philomel:
    And when I'm laid out for a corse, then be
    Thou sexton, redbreast, for to cover me.
meaning:
"To The Nightingale And Robin Redbreast." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
